Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Jun-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Lachona specially appearing for Lee Maranto on behalf of Frank Adams (Administrator).

Mr. Lachona stated that there had been a miscommunication error between the Attorney and the Administrator, that it has been resolved, and that notice to the Department of Health Care Services and the Franchise Tax Board should be done shortly. Status on close of estate is continued to June 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed by then.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Continued To Jun-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lee Maranto for (Executor)

Mr. Maranto requested a 60 day continuance, stating that he is nearly complete with wrapping up the estate, need final notice, FTB has everything, and needs to obtain verification signature from his client. Mr. Maranto stated the petition for final distribution would be filed prior to the continuance date. The Status on close of estate is continued to June 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Leslie Gomez. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
